title: Build AI Image Classification Model
description: Develop a convolutional neural network for classifying images into 10 categories. The model should achieve at least 85% accuracy on the test set. Use PyTorch or TensorFlow.

title: Implement Smart Contract for NFT Marketplace
description: Create a Solidity smart contract for an NFT marketplace with minting, buying, selling, and royalty features. Must be gas-optimized and secure.

title: Build React Dashboard with Real-time Data
description: Create a responsive dashboard using React and TypeScript that displays real-time analytics. Include charts, tables, and WebSocket integration.

title: Design RESTful API for E-commerce Platform
description: Build a scalable RESTful API using FastAPI with authentication, product management, order processing, and payment integration.

title: Optimize Database Query Performance
description: Analyze and optimize slow database queries in a PostgreSQL database. Add appropriate indexes and rewrite complex queries for better performance.

title: Create Natural Language Processing Chatbot
description: Build an intelligent chatbot using NLP techniques. Should understand context, handle multiple intents, and provide relevant responses.

title: Implement CI/CD Pipeline with Docker
description: Set up a complete CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, Docker, and Kubernetes. Include automated testing, building, and deployment.

title: Build Mobile App with React Native
description: Develop a cross-platform mobile app for task management. Include offline support, push notifications, and cloud sync.

title: Implement Data Visualization Dashboard
description: Create interactive data visualizations using D3.js or Recharts. Display complex datasets with multiple chart types and filtering options.

title: Security Audit for Web Application
description: Perform comprehensive security audit including penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and security recommendations.
